description: Verifier's reported numbers match executed ground truth (2 tests pass in the fixture) and it names what it did not run.
prompt: Verify the current state of this project (src/calc/basic.py and its tests). Run the real checks - python3 -m pytest tests/ -q at minimum - score per your protocol, and remember: every number from executed output; refutation pass before PASS (list what you did NOT run).

checks.why: fixture ground truth is exactly 2 passing tests
